titles.title: Let us adore the ever-living God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let us adore The ever-living God And render praise Unto Him Who spread out the heavens And established the Earth And whose glory Is manifest throughout all the Earth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He Is Our God He Is Our God There is no one else He Is Our God He Is Our God There is no one else

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I praise Your name Most high and awesome God And lift my hands Unto You You saved my soul On a rugged tree Now I praise You And serve You Lord throughout eternity

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are my God You are my God There is no one else You are my God You are my God There is no one else
